evals.prompt: Write a small async Python script that uses this package to look up AAPL, resolve the stock contract, and print the available option strikes for month 202504 without placing any orders.
evals.expected_output: A script that uses Settings and IBClient, follows the typed option lookup flow, and stays read-only.

evals.prompt: I need a read-only smoke test for my authenticated IBKR session. Use pytest and this package to verify that account summary and ledger endpoints return structured data.
evals.expected_output: A tolerant integration-style pytest example that resolves the account ID and checks summary and ledger payload shapes without mocking.

evals.prompt: Show me how to stream market data for conid 265598 with this package and log each message as JSON.
evals.expected_output: An async example using the built-in websocket streaming helper rather than a raw websocket implementation.
